text.title: Monorepo Setup with Turborepo Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the monorepo-turborepo methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: extract-shared-configs
step.action: Hoist tsconfig.base.json + eslint preset to root; packages extend.

step.name: wire-task-graph
step.action: Define build/test/lint with dependsOn + inputs + outputs.

step.name: remote-cache-and-ci-matrix
step.action: Add TURBO_TOKEN/TEAM env; matrix CI uses turbo --filter to scope by changed packages.
step.decision-gate: Reject ship without remote cache hits in CI logs.
